============================

   Shortest path problem

.. py:class:: shortestPathModel(grid: tuple[int, int], *args, **kwargs)

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.bases.shortestPathBase`, :py:obj:`pyepo.model.grb.grbmodel.optGrbModel`


   Gurobi-backed shortest path on a grid network.

   :ivar _model: Gurobi model
   :vartype _model: GurobiPy model
   :ivar grid: Size of grid network
   :vartype grid: tuple of int
   :ivar arcs: List of arcs

   :vartype arcs: list
